channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Scott Turow's latest real-life legal thriller: Suing Meta for copyright infringement
item.description: Five major publishing houses and the bestselling author are suing Meta and its CEO Mark Zuckerberg for allegedly training its Llama generative AI models on millions of copyrighted materials.
item.content:encoded:
Five major publishing houses and the bestselling author are suing Meta and its CEO Mark Zuckerberg for allegedly training its Llama generative AI models on millions of copyrighted materials.

(Image credit: Thos Robinson)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: A legal scholar and 'Backtalker' defends critical race theory -- a term she helped coin
item.description: Kimberlé Williams Crenshaw helped name two contested ideas in U.S. politics — intersectionality and critical race theory. Her memoir chronicles the personal and legal framework for her thinking.
item.content:encoded:
Kimberlé Williams Crenshaw helped name two contested ideas in U.S. politics — intersectionality and critical race theory. Her memoir chronicles the personal and legal framework for her thinking.

(Image credit: Carl Timpone)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: See who's nominated for the 2026 Tony Awards
item.description: Two musicals are tied with 12 nominations each: a special-effects-crammed The Lost Boys, and the candy-colored satire Schmigadoon! The Pulitzer-winning Liberation was nominated for Best Play.
item.content:encoded:
Two musicals are tied with 12 nominations each: a special-effects-crammed The Lost Boys, and the candy-colored satire Schmigadoon! The Pulitzer-winning Liberation was nominated for Best Play.

(Image credit: Matthew Murphy)
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Vanasco

item.title: It's blockbuster book season: Here are 12 new titles coming in May
item.description: Summer blockbuster season has begun — on the big screen and in bookstores. This month brings new titles from Douglas Stuart, Kathryn Stockett, Ali Smith, David Sedaris and many more.
item.content:encoded: Summer blockbuster season has begun — on the big screen and in bookstores. This month brings new titles from Douglas Stuart, Kathryn Stockett, Ali Smith, David Sedaris and many more.
item.dc:creator: Colin Dwyer

item.title: This flashy group of Portland mall walkers puts neon pep into their step
item.description: Krista Catwood wanted a fun way to exercise, so she started a mall-walking group whose unofficial costume was 1980s garb. The festive, all-ages event has exploded in popularity over the past year.
item.content:encoded:
Krista Catwood wanted a fun way to exercise, so she started a mall-walking group whose unofficial costume was 1980s garb. The festive, all-ages event has exploded in popularity over the past year.

(Image credit: Celeste Noche for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Deena Prichep

item.title: Stars showcase art-inspired fashion at 2026 Met Gala
item.description: What were the year's highlights from this year's Met Gala, and how did fashion's biggest night come to be cosponsored by Jeff Bezos?
item.content:encoded: What were the year's highlights from this year's Met Gala, and how did fashion's biggest night come to be cosponsored by Jeff Bezos?
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni settle dispute weeks before scheduled trial
item.description: In a joint statement, lawyers for the actors said they hoped the settlement would bring "closure."
item.content:encoded:
In a joint statement, lawyers for the actors said they hoped the settlement would bring "closure."

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: Chloee Weiner

item.title: See the looks from the 2026 Met Gala red carpet
item.description: Extravagantly dressed celebrities and designers made their way up the famous Met staircase Monday evening. The fundraiser is one of the fashion industry's biggest nights.
item.content:encoded:
Extravagantly dressed celebrities and designers made their way up the famous Met staircase Monday evening. The fundraiser is one of the fashion industry's biggest nights.

(Image credit: Angela Weiss)
item.dc:creator: Emily Bogle

item.title: A comedian launched a fake DHS tip line to report undocumented immigrants
item.description: Comedian Ben Palmer specializes in pranks. One of his more recent ideas for a prank was to set up a fake tip line for people to call in and report undocumented immigrants. He got hundreds of calls.
item.content:encoded: Comedian Ben Palmer specializes in pranks. One of his more recent ideas for a prank was to set up a fake tip line for people to call in and report undocumented immigrants. He got hundreds of calls.
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Garsd

item.title: A group of intergenerational mall walkers in Portland makes exercise performance art
item.description: In Portland, Ore., an intergenerational group has started a joyful weekly mall walking tradition, complete with colorful costumes.
item.content:encoded: In Portland, Ore., an intergenerational group has started a joyful weekly mall walking tradition, complete with colorful costumes.
item.dc:creator: Deena Prichep
